Book your onboarding call
Book Your Onboarding Call
We get it! Being the new kid can be tough, but we want to make sure your introduction
to FATC is as smooth as a dolphin slipping amongst the waves (that sounds pretty
smooth, right?).
We have onboarding calls just for you newbies on Mondays and Thursdays at 8am
and 8pm EST. They're group calls, so you can meet some other new kids and form a
clique or something, or become accountabilibuddies (the choice is yours).
Please note that you cannot have any campaigns reviewed, or ask Facebook ads
troubleshooting questions on this call.
To book in for one, just head here: https://go.oncehub.com/FATCOnboardingCall
If you have any questions or issues, reach out to the support team at
support@cathowell.com
